onboarding.slide1Title:
NETWỌK ỌMỤMỤ BIBLE ỤWA
SITE N’ONYE OTU RỤỌRỤ ỌZỌ
onboarding.slide1Sub: Jikọọ ndị kwere ekwe n’ụwa niile. Too ọnụ, gafee ókèala na mba niile.
onboarding.slide2Title: Hụ Osisi Gị Ka Ọ Na-eto
onboarding.slide2Sub: Oge ọmụmụ ọ bụla, ekpere ọ bụla na ọbụbụenyi ọ bụla na-agbakwunye mkpụrụ n’Osisi Ndụ gị — ihe osise nke njem ime mmụọ gị.
onboarding.slide3Title: Chọta Onye Ị Ga-amụ Ihe Ọnụ
onboarding.slide3Sub: Njikọ amamihe na-ejikọta gị na onye otu nwere otu asụsụ, mpaghara oge na oge ime mmụọ gị.
onboarding.slide4Sub: Soro n’ụlọ ekpere dị ndụ, dee n’ahụ́ mgbidi ekpere mba, ma kpee ekpere maka ndị ụwa na-erubeghị ozi ọma.

learn.title: Mụta
learn.coreCurriculumSubtitle: Usoro Ọmụmụ Isi nke P2P bụ njem iso ụzọ bụ isi nke Netwọk Ọmụmụ Bible Ụwa P2P — nke e mepụtara n’ekpere n’okpuru nduzi nke Mmụọ Nsọ, ma gbanyesie mgbọrọgwụ ike n’ikike nke Akwụkwọ Nsọ. Ọ dị iji guzobe ndị kwere ekwe n’ime Kraịst, duzie ha ruo ntozu ime mmụọ, ma zụlite ndị na-eme ndị na-eso ụzọ nke na-eburu mmetụta Alaeze Chineke n’akụkụ niile nke ọha mmadụ.
learn.coreCurriculumSubtitleQuote: E hiwere ya n’Okwu Chineke. Mmụọ Nsọ na-edu ya. E wuru ya iji mee ndị na-eso ụzọ.
learn.plansSubtitle: Atụmatụ Ọmụmụ P2P ọ bụla gbanyere mgbọrọgwụ n’ikike nke Okwu Chineke ma jiri ekpere mepụta ya iji kwadebe ndị kwere ekwe maka iso ụzọ nke gbadoro ụkwụ na Kraịst. Nkụzi kwesịrị ntụkwasị obi nke ndị ụkọchukwu, ndị nkuzi, ndị nkwusa ozi ọma na ndị ndu Ndị Kraịst tụkwasịrị obi kpaliri ha; atụmatụ ọ bụla na-agbanwe eziokwu nke Bible ka ọ bụrụ njem mmụta pụrụ iche nke na-akwalite ntozu ime mmụọ, nrubeisi bara uru na mmetụta Alaeze Chineke.
learn.plansSubtitleQuote: Olu ndị kwesịrị ntụkwasị obi kpaliri ya. Okwu Chineke gbanyere ya mgbọrọgwụ. E kere ya ịmụba ndị na-eso ụzọ.
learn.noPlans: Atụmatụ adịghị ugbu a. Bịa lelee ọzọ n’oge na-adịghị anya!
learn.unlockPlan: Mechaa atụmatụ gara aga iji kpọghee
